name: Logical View — Component Breakdown
diagram_source:
graph TD
  subgraph UI ["UI Layer (Jetpack Compose)"]
    Dashboard["DashboardScreen"]
    FastEntry["FastEntrySheet"]
    Timeline["TimelineScreen"]
    Settings["SettingsScreen"]
    Reconcile["ReconciliationScreen"]
  end
  subgraph VM ["ViewModel Layer (Hilt)"]
    DashVM["DashboardViewModel"]
    EntryVM["FastEntryViewModel"]
    TimelineVM["TimelineViewModel"]
    SettingsVM["SettingsViewModel"]
    ReconcileVM["ReconciliationViewModel"]
  end
  subgraph Domain ["Domain / Use Case Layer"]
    SaveTx["SaveTransactionUseCase"]
    SaveSplit["SaveSplitReceiptUseCase"]
    SaveTransfer["SaveTransferUseCase"]
    Reconcile2["ReconcileAccountUseCase"]
    GetBalance["GetAccountBalancesUseCase"]
  end
  subgraph Repo ["Repository Layer"]
    FinRepo["FinanceRepository"]
  end
  subgraph Data ["Data Layer (Room)"]
    TxDAO["TransactionDao"]
    AccDAO["AccountDao"]
    CatDAO["CategoryDao"]
    ProjDAO["ProjectDao"]
    DB[("AppDatabase (Room/SQLite)")]
  end
  Dashboard --> DashVM
  FastEntry --> EntryVM
  Timeline --> TimelineVM
  Settings --> SettingsVM
  Reconcile --> ReconcileVM
  DashVM --> GetBalance
  EntryVM --> SaveTx
  EntryVM --> SaveSplit
  EntryVM --> SaveTransfer
  ReconcileVM --> Reconcile2
  SaveTx --> FinRepo
  SaveSplit --> FinRepo
  SaveTransfer --> FinRepo
  Reconcile2 --> FinRepo
  GetBalance --> FinRepo
  FinRepo --> TxDAO
  FinRepo --> AccDAO
  FinRepo --> CatDAO
  FinRepo --> ProjDAO
  TxDAO --> DB
  AccDAO --> DB
  CatDAO --> DB
  ProjDAO --> DB

elements.name: DashboardScreen / DashboardViewModel
elements.description: Displays all accounts with reactive balances, total wealth, and the Pending Returns widget

elements.name: FastEntrySheet / FastEntryViewModel
elements.description: Single-screen entry for Expense, Income, Transfer, and Split Receipt

elements.name: TimelineScreen / TimelineViewModel
elements.description: Scrollable, filterable transaction history grouped by month and indicating pending returns

elements.name: SettingsScreen / SettingsViewModel
elements.description: Hub for managing Accounts, Categories, and Projects

elements.name: ReconciliationScreen / ReconciliationViewModel
elements.description: Balance verification and correction flow for all account types

elements.name: SaveTransactionUseCase
elements.description: Validates and persists a single transaction via the Repository

elements.name: SaveSplitReceiptUseCase
elements.description: Assigns a shared receipt_group_id and persists multiple transaction rows atomically

elements.name: SaveTransferUseCase
elements.description: Creates two linked transfer rows with a shared transfer_linked_id atomically

elements.name: ReconcileAccountUseCase
elements.description: Compares recorded vs actual balance and creates RECONCILIATION_ADJUSTMENT or REVALUATION transaction

elements.name: GetAccountBalancesUseCase
elements.description: Aggregates transaction amounts per account to compute current balance

elements.name: FinanceRepository
elements.description: Single Hilt Singleton wrapping all DAOs. Abstracts storage from domain logic

elements.name: AppDatabase (Room)
elements.description: Room SQLite database with all entity tables. Provides DAOs via @Database annotation
